title: Fibichik's CPVP pack
body:
Crystal PvP Modpack

A client-side modpack with over 50 mods focused on performance optimization, visual improvements, and competitive Crystal PvP gameplay.

Features:

- Significant FPS improvements and lag reduction through game optimizations
- Shield position adjustment and fire overlay removal via Overlay Tweaks
- Custom potion particle effects for cleaner visuals
- Additional mods for improved graphics and world aesthetics
- Fully client-side, compatible with most servers
- Suitable as a base for adding your own mods on top

Designed for Crystal PvP players who want smoother gameplay and better performance without sacrificing visual quality. Also includes quality-of-life features for general survival gameplay on servers.

Want a custom modpack built for your needs? Check out my Fiverr gig: https://www.fiverr.com/s/Ay5jzlq
